name: Broiled Open-Faced Crab Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon Cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the bell peppers, onion, and garlic in butter over moderately low heat, stirring until the vegetables are softened.
2. Stir in the crab meat, lemon juice, chopped egg, Worcestershire sauce, mayonnaise, mustard, and cayenne pepper; mix well.
3. Divide the mixture among the English muffin halves, mounding slightly.
4. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top of each sandwich.
5. Broil under a preheated broiler about 4 inches from the heat for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the tops are just golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and serve immediately.
